props.title: Elco On Voice-Driven Workbenches
props.subtitle: Specialized agents, creative systems, concrete rough edges, and access through building

cards.title: Voice-driven workbench
cards.body: Users speak intent, the system breaks work into parts, and specialized agents get dispatched into the flow.

cards.title: Agent roles and handoffs
cards.body: Engineering, design, concierge, content, trading, testing, and other personas share memory and hand off work across the system.

cards.title: Creative production system
cards.body: A tarot deck and design-system project showed research, memory, structured generation, and iteration working together for complex creative output.

cards.title: Concrete rough edges
cards.body: Voice reliability, profile serialization, reconnection, subprocess overhead, Discord TTS capture, and misheard destructive commands were all real constraints.

cards.title: Access through building
cards.body: Current AI already lets creative, persistent people build systems that once required credentials, teams, or institutional permission.
